title: erlangea tomentosa
intro: Erlangea tomentosa, also known as African Spotted Thistle, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Erlangea tomentosa is often combined with other plants and used in teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
